content: A button component with integrated tooltip functionality, combining Button and ActionTooltip from Gravity UI.

Props for ActionButton:

- children: React.ReactNode — Button content (icon, text, or any ReactNode)
- className: string — Additional CSS class for the button
- tooltipTitle: ActionTooltipProps['title'] — Tooltip title text
- tooltipPlacement: ActionTooltipProps['placement'] — Tooltip placement
- tooltipDisabled: ActionTooltipProps['disabled'] — Tooltip disabled state
- tooltipOpenDelay: ActionTooltipProps['openDelay'] — Tooltip open delay in ms
- tooltipCloseDelay: ActionTooltipProps['closeDelay'] — Tooltip close delay in ms
- wrapperClassName: string — Additional CSS class for the wrapper
An alert message with an indicator of alert's type opportunity to pass a button

Props for Alert:

- text (required): string
- variant: 'default' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info' — default: 'default'
- icon: React.ReactNode
- button: {
- content (required): React.ReactNode
- onClick (required): () => void
- content: React.ReactNode
- initialExpanded: boolean — default: false
- className: string
- qa: string
Base wrapper for message with support for rendering action buttons
A fully assembled chat component - the main exportable component of the library that integrates Header, ChatContent, and History.
Main chat content container with view switching between empty state and message list.

Props for ChatContent:

- view (required): ChatContentView — Display mode: 'empty' - EmptyContainer, 'chat' - MessageList
- emptyContainerProps: EmptyContainerProps — Props for EmptyContainer (used when view='empty')
- messageListProps: MessageListProps — Props for MessageList (used when view='chat')
- className: string — Additional CSS class
- qa: string — QA/test identifier
A ChatDate component displays formatted dates with time and locale support.
A circular progress indicator that visualizes context usage as a percentage (0-100%).
A compact component that displays diff statistics showing the number of added and deleted lines.
A Disclaimer component displays informational or warning messages
A template component for displaying a welcome screen with image, title, description, and suggestions.

Props for EmptyContainer:

- image: React.ReactNode — Image or icon to display at the top
- title: React.ReactNode — Title text or custom React element for the welcome screen
- description: React.ReactNode — Description text or custom React element explaining the functionality
- suggestionTitle: React.ReactNode — Title for the suggestions section - can be string or custom React element
- suggestions: Suggestion[] — Array of suggestion items
- onSuggestionClick: (content: string, id?: string) => void — Callback when a suggestion is clicked
- alignment: AlignmentConfig — Alignment configuration for image, title, and description
- layout: 'grid' | 'list' — Layout orientation for suggestions: 'grid' for horizontal, 'list' for vertical
- wrapText: boolean — Enable text wrapping inside suggestion buttons instead of ellipsis
- showMore: () => void — Callback for showing more suggestions
- showMoreText: string — Custom text for the show more button
- className: string — Additional CSS class
- qa: string — QA/test identifier
Header component for displaying chat header with navigation and actions.
A comprehensive chat history component that displays a list of chats in a popup with integrated search, grouping, and action capabilities.

Props for History:

- open: boolean — Control popup open state
- onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void — Callback when popup open state changes
- anchorElement (required): HTMLElement | null — Anchor element for the popup
Wrapper component for Intersection Observer API. Used for automatic loading of previous messages when scrolling up in `MessageList`.

Props for IntersectionContainer:

- children: React.ReactNode
- onIntersect: () => void
- options: IntersectionObserverInit
- className: string

Props for Loader:

- view: 'streaming' | 'loading' — default: 'streaming'
- size: LoaderSize — default: 's'
- className: string
- qa: string
A flexible input component for chat interfaces with support for simple and full views, expandable panels, attachments, suggestions, and more.
A footer component for prompt input that displays action icons (settings, attachment, microphone) and a submit button.
A header component for prompt input that displays context items, context indicator, or custom content.
A simple panel container component that displays custom content.
Universal rating block with title and star rating.
A loading animation component that creates a shimmer effect over its children.
A star rating component for displaying and collecting user ratings from 1 to 5 stars.

Props for StarRating:

- value: number — Current rating value (1-5)
- onChange: (rating: number) => void — Callback when rating changes
- disabled: boolean — default: false — Disabled state
- size: StarRatingSize — default: 'l' — Size variant
- className: string — Additional CSS class
- qa: string — QA/test identifier
A submit button component with state management through props and send/cancel icon switching.

Props for SubmitButton:

- onClick (required): () => Promise<void> — Click handler
- state (required): SubmitButtonState — Button state
- className: string — Additional CSS class
- size: ButtonButtonProps['size'] — default: 'm' — Button size
- tooltipSend: string — Custom tooltip for enabled state
- tooltipCancel: string — Custom tooltip for cancelable state
- cancelableText: string — Custom cancelable text (if provided, will be shown in cancelable state)
- qa: string — QA/test identifier
A Suggestions component displays a group of clickable suggestion buttons arranged in either horizontal (grid) or vertical (list) layout.
Tabs component for switching between sections with optional delete functionality. Built on top of Gravity UI's Label component.
A message component that displays AI thinking process with collapsible content and a status indicator.
Footer component for tool messages with action buttons and status message
Header component for tool messages with icon, name, actions, and status indicators
A status indicator component that displays different icons based on the tool execution status. Shows a loader for loading state.
Complete tool message component with automatic expand/collapse functionality and status-based behavior
Component for displaying tool status with indicators and localized text
